official_name: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program
notes: US government program for standardized security assessment of cloud products. Defines security baselines (Low, Moderate, High, LI-SaaS) based on NIST 800-53. Required for cloud services used by federal agencies.

match_nodes.description: FedRAMP security baselines (Low, Moderate, High, LI-SaaS)

data.description: Security control baselines derived from NIST SP 800-53, tailored for cloud services at different impact levels.
data.notes: FedRAMP baselines select and tailor NIST SP 800-53 controls for cloud environments. Low baseline (~125 controls), Moderate baseline (~325 controls), High baseline (~421 controls), and LI-SaaS (Low Impact Software as a Service) for low-risk SaaS. Baselines are updated when NIST 800-53 is revised. Currently aligned with Rev 5.

urls.note: FedRAMP document library including baseline spreadsheets

match_nodes.description: FedRAMP marketplace of authorized cloud services

data.description: Public directory of cloud service offerings that have achieved FedRAMP authorization.
data.notes: Searchable directory of FedRAMP authorized, in-process, and ready cloud service offerings (CSOs). Includes authorization status, sponsoring agency, impact level, and service model.
